name: Minimum/maximum
description:
This simple algorithm computes the minimum and maximum of two input voltages.

Note that with one input disabled, or at 0V, this effectively performs half-wave rectification.

specifications.name: Channels
specifications.description: The number of bus channels to process.

parameters.name: Input A
parameters.description: One of the two input busses to process.

parameters.name: Input B
parameters.description: One of the two input busses to process.

parameters.name: Min output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above for the minimum voltage.

parameters.name: Max output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above for the maximum voltage.

output_ports.name: Min output
output_ports.description: The output bus for the minimum voltage.

output_ports.name: Max output
output_ports.description: The output bus for the maximum voltage.
